nodes.name: sse_reconnect.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-159 M2 acceptance test: covers SSE resubscribe-after-completion, mid-stream replay with last-event-id, and live mid-stream reconnect over the A2A server.

nodes.name: TriggerRunner
nodes.summary: Test TaskRunner whose intermediate events fire on an mpsc trigger so tests can observe broadcast-channel timing.

nodes.name: Harness
nodes.summary: Holds base URL, trigger sender, and signing key for the A2A SSE test server.

nodes.name: drain_until_final
nodes.summary: Pulls SSE chunks until a final=true status arrives or the deadline elapses, returning parsed status events.

nodes.name: boot
nodes.summary: Spins up an A2aServer with a TriggerRunner bound to an ephemeral TCP port and returns a Harness.

nodes.name: resubscribe_after_completion_returns_terminal_without_panic
nodes.summary: Asserts resubscribe replays the terminal Completed status after task completion.

nodes.name: resubscribe_after_disconnect_replays_missed_events
nodes.summary: Drops first subscriber mid-stream and asserts the resubscribed connection sees missed events without duplicates.

nodes.name: resubscribe_live_delivers_post_attach_events
nodes.summary: Asserts resubscribe attached mid-task delivers post-attach events and final=true without wedging.

nodes.name: sse_stream.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-159 M2 acceptance test: SlowRunner emits 3 intermediate Working events and asserts the SSE stream sees submitted→working×3→completed in order.

nodes.name: SlowRunner
nodes.summary: Test TaskRunner that emits three Working status events on the broadcast channel before returning Completed.

nodes.name: sse_stream_receives_submitted_working_x3_completed_in_order
nodes.summary: End-to-end SSE test asserting exactly five status frames with final=true only on Completed.

nodes.name: task_cancel.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-159 M1 test that tasks/cancel cooperatively terminates an in-flight runner without panic, tolerating early-completion races.

nodes.name: agent
nodes.summary: Helper that builds a fresh AgentID from a generated ed25519 signing key.

nodes.name: spec
nodes.summary: Builds a TaskSpec with a root TaskContext for the cancel test.

nodes.name: cancel_drives_task_to_canceled_state
nodes.summary: Spawns InMemoryRunner, calls executor.cancel, and asserts the terminal state is Canceled or Completed.

nodes.name: task_lifecycle.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-159 M1 test that InMemoryRunner drives a task Submitted→Working→Completed with history and at least one artifact.

nodes.name: agent
nodes.summary: Helper to mint an AgentID for lifecycle test fixtures.

nodes.name: spec
nodes.summary: Constructs a TaskSpec routed to the rag.query skill.

nodes.name: in_memory_runner_completes_task_with_history
nodes.summary: Asserts an InMemoryRunner reaches Completed with at least 2 history entries and 1 artifact.

nodes.name: trace_lineage.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-159 M1 r3 tests for TaskContext: trace_id format, child() depth/lineage propagation, and metadata round-trip.

nodes.name: fresh_id
nodes.summary: Generates a fresh AgentID for context tests.

nodes.name: new_root_has_depth_zero_and_hex_trace_id
nodes.summary: Asserts new_root produces depth 0, empty visited_agents, and a 32-char lowercase hex trace_id.

nodes.name: child_increments_depth_and_preserves_trace_id
nodes.summary: Asserts TaskContext.child() preserves trace_id and appends parent agent to visited_agents.

nodes.name: metadata_roundtrip_preserves_all_fields
nodes.summary: Asserts TaskContext.to_metadata/from_metadata round-trip preserves all lineage fields.

nodes.name: witness_handoff.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-159 acceptance #2: validates that ruLake witness handoff bodies stay ≤2 KiB regardless of underlying payload size.

nodes.name: agent
nodes.summary: Helper minting an AgentID.

nodes.name: tasks_send_body
nodes.summary: Builds a JSON-RPC tasks/send envelope embedding a RuLakeWitness artifact and returns serialized bytes.

nodes.name: witness_handoff_body_under_2kib
nodes.summary: Asserts the witness handoff body is ≤ 2 KiB.

nodes.name: witness_body_size_independent_of_represented_vector_count
nodes.summary: Asserts body size does not scale with represented vector count.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for rvagent-acp — ACP server binary with axum, tower-http, clap, and dependencies on core/backends/middleware/tools/subagents.

nodes.name: agent.rs
nodes.summary: AcpAgent wraps an AgentGraph + session store, exposing prompt/session lifecycle APIs for the ACP server.

nodes.name: Session
nodes.summary: Per-session ACP state holding id, history, and timestamps.

nodes.name: AcpToolExecutor
nodes.summary: Internal ToolExecutor implementation used by the ACP agent graph.

nodes.name: StubModel
nodes.summary: Stub ChatModel implementation used when no real model is wired in.

nodes.name: AcpAgent
nodes.summary: Top-level ACP agent owning the model, tool executor, graph, and session map.

nodes.name: auth.rs
nodes.summary: Axum middleware for API-key auth, token-bucket rate limiting, body-size limits, and optional TLS enforcement.

nodes.name: ApiKeyState
nodes.summary: Shared state holding the configured API keys for require_api_key middleware.

nodes.name: Bucket
nodes.summary: Per-client token bucket used by the rate limiter.

nodes.name: RateLimiterState
nodes.summary: Shared rate limiter state with configured capacity and refill rate.

nodes.name: MaxBodySize
nodes.summary: Newtype wrapper for the request_size_limit middleware threshold.

nodes.name: RequireTls
nodes.summary: Newtype flag controlling whether the TLS-required middleware rejects plaintext requests.

nodes.name: require_api_key
nodes.summary: Axum middleware that rejects requests missing or mismatching the configured API key.

nodes.name: rate_limiter
nodes.summary: Axum middleware enforcing token-bucket rate limits per client.

nodes.name: request_size_limit
nodes.summary: Axum middleware enforcing maximum request body size.

nodes.name: require_tls_middleware
nodes.summary: Axum middleware that rejects requests not arriving over TLS when configured.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Library entry point re-exporting agent, auth, server, and types modules for the rvagent-acp crate.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: ACP server binary entry point parsing CLI args with clap and booting an AcpServer.

nodes.name: Cli
nodes.summary: clap-derived CLI struct configuring the ACP server bind address, auth, and TLS.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Tokio main entrypoint: parses CLI, constructs AcpAgent + AcpServer, and serves.

nodes.name: server.rs
nodes.summary: AcpServer wires axum routes (prompt, sessions, health) with auth, rate-limit, body-limit, and TLS middleware.

nodes.name: AcpConfig
nodes.summary: Server configuration: bind address, API keys, rate limits, body size, TLS requirement.

nodes.name: AppState
nodes.summary: Shared axum app state bundling the AcpAgent.

nodes.name: AcpServer
nodes.summary: ACP HTTP server that constructs the axum router with middleware and serves it.

nodes.name: handle_prompt
nodes.summary: POST /prompt handler that runs the agent for a session and returns a PromptResponse.

nodes.name: handle_list_sessions
nodes.summary: GET /sessions handler returning the list of active sessions.

nodes.name: handle_create_session
nodes.summary: POST /sessions handler creating a new session.

nodes.name: handle_get_session
nodes.summary: GET /sessions/:id handler returning session metadata.

nodes.name: handle_delete_session
nodes.summary: DELETE /sessions/:id handler removing a session.

nodes.name: handle_health
nodes.summary: GET /health handler returning a basic HealthResponse.

nodes.name: types.rs
nodes.summary: Wire types for ACP: ContentBlock, PromptRequest/Response, SessionInfo, HealthResponse, ErrorResponse.

nodes.name: ContentBlock
nodes.summary: Tagged union for prompt content blocks (text and structured variants).

nodes.name: PromptRequest
nodes.summary: Incoming prompt payload with session id and content blocks.

nodes.name: ResponseMessage
nodes.summary: Outgoing assistant message wrapping role and content blocks.

nodes.name: PromptResponse
nodes.summary: Server reply containing the assistant message and session metadata.

nodes.name: SessionInfo
nodes.summary: Compact session descriptor returned by list/get session endpoints.

nodes.name: CreateSessionRequest
nodes.summary: Payload for creating a new session.

nodes.name: HealthResponse
nodes.summary: Health endpoint response shape.

nodes.name: ErrorResponse
nodes.summary: Standardized error response with helpers for mapping common HTTP status codes.

nodes.name: integration_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests covering health, auth, session lifecycle and isolation, config defaults, and wire-format invariants for the ACP server.

nodes.name: test_health_endpoint
nodes.summary: Asserts the /health endpoint returns 200 with the expected payload.

nodes.name: test_auth_required
nodes.summary: Asserts protected routes reject requests without a valid API key.

nodes.name: test_session_lifecycle
nodes.summary: Walks create → get → delete on a session and asserts each step.

nodes.name: test_session_isolation
nodes.summary: Asserts sessions do not leak history across distinct session ids.

nodes.name: test_acp_config_defaults
nodes.summary: Validates AcpConfig::default values.

nodes.name: test_error_response_status_codes
nodes.summary: Validates ErrorResponse helper constructors map to correct HTTP status codes.

nodes.name: test_content_block_wire_format
nodes.summary: Asserts ContentBlock JSON serialization matches the agreed wire shape.

nodes.name: backend_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benches for filesystem utility hot paths: line-number formatting, path resolution, literal grep, and Unicode detection.

nodes.name: make_lines
nodes.summary: Generates a string of n synthetic source lines for benchmarks.

nodes.name: make_content_bytes
nodes.summary: Generates a buffer approximating target_bytes for content benches.

nodes.name: bench_format_content_with_line_numbers
nodes.summary: Benches format_content_with_line_numbers across content sizes.

nodes.name: bench_path_resolution
nodes.summary: Benches path resolution utilities.

nodes.name: bench_grep_literal
nodes.summary: Benches literal grep over generated content.

nodes.name: bench_unicode_detection
nodes.summary: Benches unicode_security detection hot path.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for rvagent-backends — filesystem/shell/composite backends with criterion benches and grep crates.

nodes.name: anthropic.rs
nodes.summary: Anthropic Claude API ChatModel backend handling request/response framing, tool-use blocks, and key resolution.

nodes.name: ApiMessage
nodes.summary: Wire-level message struct sent to Anthropic API.

nodes.name: ApiContent
nodes.summary: Variant: a string or a list of typed ContentBlocks.

nodes.name: ContentBlock
nodes.summary: Anthropic content blocks: text, tool_use, tool_result.

nodes.name: ApiRequest
nodes.summary: Top-level Anthropic chat completion request envelope.

nodes.name: ApiResponse
nodes.summary: Anthropic chat completion response envelope.

nodes.name: Usage
nodes.summary: Token usage subobject from the Anthropic API response.

nodes.name: ApiErrorResponse
nodes.summary: Error envelope returned by the Anthropic API on failures.

nodes.name: ApiErrorDetail
nodes.summary: Detail struct embedded inside ApiErrorResponse.

nodes.name: AnthropicClient
nodes.summary: ChatModel implementation calling the Anthropic API with retries, tool handling, and key resolution.

nodes.name: resolve_api_key
nodes.summary: Resolves an Anthropic API key from environment or other ApiKeySource variants.

nodes.name: composite.rs
nodes.summary: CompositeBackend that fans out Backend trait calls across filesystem, shell, state, and store sub-backends.

nodes.name: CompositeBackend
nodes.summary: Aggregate Backend implementation dispatching operations to inner specialized backends.

nodes.name: filesystem.rs
nodes.summary: FilesystemBackend providing read/write/list/grep/glob/edit operations with path sandboxing and unicode safety.

nodes.name: FilesystemBackendInner
nodes.summary: Inner shared state for the filesystem backend, holding root path and limits.

nodes.name: FilesystemBackend
nodes.summary: Backend trait implementor for sandboxed local filesystem operations.

nodes.name: lexical_normalize
nodes.summary: Lexical path normalization that collapses . and .. without touching disk.

nodes.name: gemini.rs
nodes.summary: Google Gemini ChatModel backend with request/response framing and API key resolution.

nodes.name: Part
nodes.summary: Gemini content part struct.

nodes.name: GeminiContent
nodes.summary: Gemini content envelope grouping role and parts.

nodes.name: GenerationConfig
nodes.summary: Generation configuration sent with Gemini requests.

nodes.name: GeminiRequest
nodes.summary: Top-level Gemini API request envelope.

nodes.name: Candidate
nodes.summary: Gemini response candidate.

nodes.name: GeminiResponse
nodes.summary: Gemini response envelope.

nodes.name: UsageMetadata
nodes.summary: Token usage metadata in Gemini responses.

nodes.name: GeminiError
nodes.summary: Error envelope returned by Gemini API.

nodes.name: GeminiErrorDetail
nodes.summary: Detail struct embedded in GeminiError.

nodes.name: GeminiClient
nodes.summary: ChatModel implementation backed by Google Gemini.

nodes.name: resolve_api_key
nodes.summary: Resolves the Gemini API key from environment or ApiKeySource.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Library entry point re-exporting anthropic, composite, filesystem, gemini, local_shell, protocol, rvf_store, sandbox, security, state, store, unicode_security, utils.

nodes.name: local_shell.rs
nodes.summary: LocalShellBackend providing sandboxed shell command execution with allowlists, env scrubbing, and SandboxBackend trait.

nodes.name: CommandAllowlist
nodes.summary: Allowlist matcher gating which commands the shell backend may execute.

nodes.name: LocalShellConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration: allowlist, env scrubbing, timeouts, working directory bounds.

nodes.name: LocalShellBackend
nodes.summary: Backend + SandboxBackend implementation executing local shell commands with safety guards.

nodes.name: build_safe_env
nodes.summary: Builds a sanitized environment map for child shell processes.

nodes.name: is_sensitive_env_var
nodes.summary: Returns true when an env var name is on the deny list (secrets, tokens, etc.).
